changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Allow boutique managers to manage users scoped to their assigned boutique.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO rel_profil_metier__permissions (profil_metier_id, permissions_id) SELECT p.id, pm.id FROM profil_metier p JOIN permission_metier pm ON pm.code IN ('USER_CREATE', 'USER_UPDATE', 'USER_DEACTIVATE') WHERE p.code = 'MANAGER_BOUTIQUE' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
